prs.title: fix(auth): token refresh race on parallel tabs
prs.author: alice
prs.reason: This PR addresses a critical authentication issue that can lead to unexpected user logouts, significantly impacting user experience and application availability.

prs.title: feat(webhooks): signed delivery retry on 5xx
prs.author: bob
prs.reason: This PR fixes a critical reliability issue for webhook deliveries experiencing transient errors, significantly improving data consistency and user experience for integrations.

prs.title: perf(executor): batch stream flush on high-QPS runs
prs.author: dave
prs.reason: This PR addresses a performance issue impacting p99 latency in high-QPS scenarios, which is a critical operational metric.

prs.title: fix(scheduler): prevent duplicate fire on leader transition
prs.author: eve
prs.reason: This PR addresses a bug that can lead to duplicate job executions, which is a critical issue for a scheduler and can cause data corruption or resource waste.

prs.title: security: redact api_key values in step_runs.params_json
prs.author: jack
prs.reason: This PR addresses a critical security vulnerability where sensitive API keys could be persistently logged in the database, potentially leading to unauthorized access if the database is compromised.

prs.title: docs: clarify SMTP connector TLS mode options
prs.author: carol
prs.reason: This PR fixes a documentation inconsistency that could lead to user confusion or incorrect configuration, but it's not a critical bug or security issue.

prs.title: feat(mcp): workspace-scoped MCP server enable/disable
prs.author: frank
prs.reason: This is a new feature (feat) that introduces a significant change in how MCP servers are managed, moving from org-wide to workspace-scoped control, with a database schema change for backward compatibility.

prs.title: fix(ui): dark-mode contrast on secondary buttons
prs.author: grace
prs.reason: This PR addresses a user-reported accessibility issue (low contrast) on key UI elements, which impacts usability for some users.

prs.title: refactor(storage): replace manual connection pool with asyncpg built-in
prs.author: henry
prs.reason: This PR improves reliability and reduces code complexity by leveraging a robust built-in connection pool, which is a significant quality-of-life and maintenance enhancement, but doesn't introduce critical new features or fix an urgent bug.

prs.title: feat(api): bulk archive endpoint for pipelines
prs.author: iris
prs.reason: This PR adds a new bulk API endpoint, improving efficiency but also requiring careful consideration for error handling and idempotency.
